title: Chakravageswarar Temple
tagline: Chakravageswarar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Chakramangai or Chakravageswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Hindu deity Shiva and is located in Chakkarapalli, Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Chakramangai or Chakravageswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Hindu deity Shiva and is located in Chakkarapalli, Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is incarnated by the hymns of Thevaram, the 7th century Tamil literature and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam. It is one of the 275 Paadal Petra Sthalams, where the three of the most revered Nayanars (Saivite Saints), Appar and Tirugnana Sambandar have glorified the temple with their verses during the 7th-8th century. The temple has been widely expanded by Chola kings during the 11th century.

topPlaces.name: Chakkarapalli
topPlaces.description: Chakkarapalli is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located in between Thanjavur - Kumbakonam highway.

topPlaces.name: Ayyampettai, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Ayyampettai is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 15 km from Thanjavur and 24 km from Kumbakonam.

topPlaces.name: Harimukteesvarar Temple, Ariyamangai
topPlaces.description: Harimukteesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Siva located in Ariyamangai of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India

topPlaces.name: Ragunathapuram
topPlaces.description: Ragunathapuram is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Pasupathikoil
topPlaces.description: Pasupathikoil is a village in the Papanasam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It has an early chola temple of Brahmapurisvarar called Tirupullamangai.

topPlaces.name: Vadakurangaduthurai
topPlaces.description: Vadakurangaduthurai is a village located in the Papanasam taluk on the north bank of the Kaveri river, Tamil Nadu, India. It is 4 km from the town of Papanasam and is also known as Aduthurai and Aaduthurai Perumal Koil.

topPlaces.name: Dayanidheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sri Dayanidheeswarar Temple (ஸ்ரீ தயாநிதீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Vadakurangaduthurai in the Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India dedicated to the Hindu God Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Soolamangalam
topPlaces.description: Soolamangalam is a village in Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu state in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chakravageswarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chakravageswarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chakravageswarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (57 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chakravageswarar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chakravageswarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chakravageswarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chakravageswarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chakravageswarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chakkarapalli, Ayyampettai, Thanjavur, Harimukteesvarar Temple, Ariyamangai, Ragunathapuram, Pasupathikoil.
